title: Oil prices: Brent +5% to ~$95 on Iran suspension news, then slips to ~$91; WTI ~$92
snippet: Brent crude spikes 5% to approximately $95/barrel on June 2 following Iran's announcement of suspended talks. Slips back toward $91 on June 3 amid mixed signals. WTI fluctuates around $92. Oil market highly sensitive to diplomatic signals; suspension news immediately reversed prior week's downward trend.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 이란 협상 중단 뉴스에 브렌트유 5% 급등 후 하락. 외교 신호에 민감한 유가 동향. 이전 하락 추세 반전
